title: Distributed table with cityHash64(vin) incorrectly skips the shard when optimize_skip_unused_shards is enabled
description:
### Company or project name
VinAssessment
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
When querying a Distributed table sharded by cityHash64(vin), ClickHouse incorrectly skips the shard that contains the data for certain VIN values. As a result, the query returns 0 rows, although the rows exist in the underlying ReplicatedMergeTree tables.
The issue disappears when disabling optimize_skip_unused_shards.
This appears to be a shard routing bug in the shard skipping optimizer.
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
🧭 Environment
ClickHouse version: 25.10.2.65
Cluster: 3 shards × 2 replicas
All nodes have identical schemas, configs, macros {shard}, {replica}, and cluster definitions.
### How to reproduce
Table Definitions
Local table
```
CREATE TABLE fact_shards.vehicle_vins_view
(
`vehicle_id` UUID,
`vin` String,
`zip_code` UInt32,
`window_sticker` String,
`auction_vehicle` UInt8,
`vehicle_updated_at` DateTime,
`vehicle_created_at` DateTime
)
ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/clickhouse/tables/{shard}/fact_shards/vehicle_vins_view', '{replica}')
PARTITION BY cityHash64(vin) % 1000
ORDER BY (vin, vehicle_id)
SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192;
```
Distributed table
```
CREATE TABLE fact_shards.vehicle_vins_view_distr
(
`vehicle_id` UUID,
`vin` String,
`zip_code` UInt32,
`window_sticker` String,
`auction_vehicle` UInt8,
`vehicle_updated_at` DateTime,
`vehicle_created_at` DateTime
)
ENGINE = Distributed('fact', 'fact_shards', 'vehicle_vins_view', cityHash64(vin));
```
### Expected behavior
❗ Problem Description
For some VIN values, the Distributed table returns no rows, even though data exists in the underlying local table.
Example VIN: KL7CJPSB2JB613659
❌ Wrong Result From Distributed Table
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fact_shards.vehicle_vins_view_test (vehicle_id BINARY(16), vin VARCHAR(255), zip_code INT UNSIGNED, window_sticker VARCHAR(255), auction_vehicle TINYINT UNSIGNED, vehicle_updated_at DATETIME, vehicle_created_at DATETIME);

INSERT INTO fact_shards.vehicle_vins_view_test (vehicle_id, vin, zip_code, window_sticker, auction_vehicle, vehicle_updated_at, vehicle_created_at) VALUES (UUID(), 'KL7CJPSB2JB613659', 12345, 'Sticker1', 1, NOW(), NOW());

INSERT INTO fact_shards.vehicle_vins_view_test (vehicle_id, vin, zip_code, window_sticker, auction_vehicle, vehicle_updated_at, vehicle_created_at) VALUES (UUID(), 'INVALID_VIN', 54321, 'Sticker2', 0, NOW(), NOW());
key_bug_features: Shard skipping optimizer with cityHash64(vin) routing
